verse_text: In that day,' says the Lord Almighty, 'I shall take you, Zerubbabel, My servant, the son of Shealtiel,' says the Lord, 'and shall make you like a signet ring; for I have chosen you.'

links.context: The significance of the robe is righteousness granted by baptism (Is 61:10), the signet ring is family identity ([[HAG.2:23]]), and the sandals refer to walking according to the gospel ([[EPH.6:15]]).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
